mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_no::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docNo FROM esg.tb_safety_health_comm_plan WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_safety_health_comm_plan ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, comp_id, title, hr_id, hr_nm, write_dt, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{compId}, #{title}, #{hrId}, #{hrNm}, #{writeDt}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )

SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(doc_seq::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeq FROM esg.tb_safety_health_comm_plan_detail WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_safety_health_comm_plan_detail ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, comp_id, content_type, content, period, subject, method, ord_seq, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, #{compId}, #{contentType}, #{content}, #{period}, #{subject}, #{method}, #{ordSeq}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
